summary: Complete end-to-end testing of Emergent Document Hub - all core features working correctly with 94.1% backend API success rate and full frontend functionality verified

minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior - user already exists from previous test runs

ui_warnings.issue: React hydration warnings about span elements in table structure
ui_warnings.impact: Console warnings only - functionality not affected

passed_tests: User registration/login flow with test@test.com and demo@emergent.com
Home page loads with 10 category cards showing document counts
Sidebar navigation with 10 categories and 26 documents
Document viewing with breadcrumbs, title, and content
Search dialog opens and finds results (transformer, kubernetes, agent)
Dark/Light mode toggle switches themes correctly
New document creation with title, category, and markdown content
Backend API: Full CRUD operations for documents
